---
title: "utils.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/core/utils.py"
loc: 59
complexity: 4
logic_score: 4.95
style_score: 4.01
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.94
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating SovereignUtils, load_config.

## Interaction Protocol
Import SovereignUtils and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 4.9/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 21 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [contextlib](file://contextlib)
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [queue](file://queue)
- [re](file://re)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [threading](file://threading)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [msvcrt](file://msvcrt)

### Exports
- `SovereignUtils`
- `load_config`
- `safe_read_json`
- `sanitize_query`
- `input_with_timeout`
- `_read`
- `atomic_jsonl_append`
- `_read_json_file`
